papers.reason: Reality Mining is a foundational real-world social sensing and behavioral data collection platform precedent.
StudentLife is a campus-scale smartphone sensing and authentic behavioral data collection precedent.
FineWeb is used here as a web-corpus quality and measurement anchor for Beat 2, even though it also overlaps with E.
RefinedWeb functions here as a web-corpus quality / filtering anchor for Beat 2.
The C4 documentation paper is treated as a web-corpus composition and quality-measurement anchor.
The Wikipedia paper is a temporal online-content prevalence anchor, best aligned with H in this thesis.
Self-Instruct is a direct instruction-data composition anchor for alignment fine-tuning.
WizardLM is a direct instruction-data generation / complexity-mixture anchor.
From Quantity to Quality is a direct instruction-tuning data-selection / quality-vs-quantity anchor.
OpenAssistant Conversations is a foundational open alignment-data corpus and belongs in J for this thesis.
Curious Decline is treated as a diversity-metric / text-quality measurement anchor under recursive synthetic training.
Snell et al. is the strongest direct test-time compute scaling anchor for Beat 7.
Wei et al. is the canonical chain-of-thought foundation required for Beat 7.
DeepSeek-R1 is an open-weight reasoning / inference-time-rival anchor for Beat 7.
s1 is a direct simple test-time scaling anchor for Beat 7.
Constitutional AI is the canonical RLAIF counterevidence anchor for Beat 4.

_note: Manual classification override layer for a very small set of known anchor papers that repeatedly misclassify despite being central to the current thesis.
